questions.question: Write a React component that renders an issue tracker, including input fields for title and description, and a button to submit the form. Use React Classes and pass the input values as a function component property.
questions.hint: Use React Hooks to handle form submission

questions.question: Compare and contrast the use of `props` versus `children` in React. Provide an example of a React component that uses both, and explain the differences in their usage.
questions.hint: Focus on the differences in usage and not the benefits

questions.question: Create a dynamic composition of React components using the `map` function. Display a list of 5 items, each rendered as a separate component. Use a key to ensure unique component rendering.
